issues.detail: The skill lacks comprehensive error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Build dedup+LLM-scored news ingestion pipeline
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses naive URL-set dedup and unstructured prompts; treatment uses SequenceMatcher 0.75 threshold dedup, gpt-4o-mini with response_format JSON, and the documented CATEGORIES list with 1-10 severity.

scenarios.name: Add severity-based multi-channel alerting
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes ad-hoc Slack notifications; treatment implements the documented ALERT_RULES list with wildcard category, min_severity gating, and the formatted [CATEGORY] Severity X/10 message structure.
